creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 189533
update to 4.1.0

Latest changelog states that python 2.6 and 3.2 support have been dropped, so add minimum python27 requirement. Also add NO_ARCH to silence a sanity check.

A port I'm working on depends on this port, however that port crashes on runtime due to this port's outdated nature, specifically with 3.8.0 not explicitly supporting python 3 for which the other port requires.
